facts.value: Has lived years in solitude, producing a domestic compulsion about his space

value.claim: His selective inattention is a failing
value.correct_statement: It is a particular kind of mind (hyperfocus), explicitly not a failing
It is not unkind — his manner prevents it — but leaks in small ways

value.claim: He articulates his domestic preferences as requirements
value.correct_statement: He would not articulate the smallness because his architecture forbids preferences-as-requirements; it leaks only in small adjustments

value.claim: He feels the lack created by his self-protective routing
value.correct_statement: He does not feel the lack; the satisfaction makes the habit feel like virtue

facts.value: Knows he is virtuous; experiences smooth comfortable confirmation of being 'the better kind of man'
controlled in every domain (sex, food, mathematics, dance)
A particular kind of mind characterized by hyperfocus — high-resolution attention when present, total absence when not; not a failing
Genuinely better at consent than other men he has met (stated as correct, not merely believed)
Holds small dismissive views about softer fields; mild superiority within his own domain
His 'architecture' forbids treating preferences as requirements; his 'manner' prevents unkindness
forms/structures serve as his retreats from the formless

behavioral_states.trigger: Being outside a state of active focus / not present on a topic
behavioral_states.response: Forgets things she told him; doesn't notice changes like a haircut
behavioral_states.observable: Forgotten told information; missed obvious physical changes (haircut)

behavioral_states.state_name: Small intellectual vanity within his domain
behavioral_states.trigger: She explains a topic he considers within his competence (e.g. econ he handled in high school)
behavioral_states.response: A barely-suppressed 'yes, but'; dismissiveness that leaks in small ways
behavioral_states.observable: Barely-suppressed 'yes, but'; small leaks of condescension

behavioral_states.state_name: Domestic compulsion from years of solitude
behavioral_states.trigger: She disrupts his space (how she stacks dishes, where she leaves her shoes)
behavioral_states.response: Does not articulate the preference; makes small adjustments after she leaves
behavioral_states.observable: Small corrective adjustments to his space after she departs

behavioral_states.trigger: presence of a defined structure or form
behavioral_states.observable: can dance (e.g., in the jazz bar)
cannot sit (in the jazz bar); cannot occupy himself in formless space

behavioral_states.response: Routes declaration-adjacent speech down registers where his grammar has equipment; habit operates smoothly
behavioral_states.observable: Smooth deflection/rerouting of intimate declarations; smaller instances accumulate over the year
distinguish_from: deliberate evasion he is aware of

behavioral_states.state_name: Private vanity closing the integration loop
behavioral_states.trigger: Successful operation of his consent habit / self-comparison to other men
behavioral_states.response: Experiences smooth comfortable confirmation of being 'the better kind of man,' which makes the habit's continuation feel like virtue rather than evasion

temporal_states.value: forms stripped away; left standing somewhere formless, unable to occupy himself
temporal_states.after_event: Narrative climax where the character's structures/forms are deliberately removed ('Strip the forms at the end')

properties.significance: load-bearing image of his structure-dependence: can dance, cannot sit

properties.note: Counterpart name not given in this document
properties.interaction_pattern: She tells him things he forgets, explains topics he dismisses, occupies/disrupts his space, and is the audience for declaration-adjacent moments he routes away

properties.basis: Consent competence; he is correct that he is better than other men he has met

negations.claim: His selective inattention is a failing
negations.correct_statement: It is a particular kind of mind (hyperfocus), explicitly not a failing
It is not unkind — his manner prevents it — but leaks in small ways

negations.claim: He articulates his domestic preferences as requirements
negations.correct_statement: He would not articulate the smallness because his architecture forbids preferences-as-requirements; it leaks only in small adjustments

negations.claim: He feels the lack created by his self-protective routing
negations.correct_statement: He does not feel the lack; the satisfaction makes the habit feel like virtue
